confidence_rationale: Clear view of suture placement between marks, all three throws visible with proper hand alternation. Exact completion time estimated from visible timestamp progression. Cannot definitively assess final suture cutting phase quality due to video ending.

technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid, precise execution. All phases completed efficiently with proper technique. Suture placement accurate between marks, knot sequence follows correct pattern with hand alternation.
strengths: Rapid needle loading and suture placement (expert-level timing)
Precise suture placement between marked lines
Correct surgeon's knot followed by two single throws
improvement_suggestions: Video ends before cutting phase completion can be fully assessed
